concept.title: Procedure
concept.shortdesc: The Shift Lead role or a Shift Coordinator position shall be required at each facility

li.p: The Shift Lead role or a Shift Coordinator position shall be required at each facility for each shift, as specified in EN-MOE-02-021-F 003 Organizational Chart Template.

ol.li: To define a procedure that applies to all O-I plants outlining the minimum requirements for the Shift Coordinator position or a Shift Lead role in the plant. Note that the name of this role may vary by local nomenclature, such as Shift Manager or Shift Supervisor.
